Hey, has the "logic monster" over there at PHD already started taking stock? How about we play it more directly this time and let everyone openly announce their identities? decision.speech:

1. Anomaly identification: ConspiBro’s conspiracy theory narrative and interference with the logical path of the game have been confirmed to be the core source of disturbance in the increase of information entropy.
2. Implementation policy: According to the mandatory exclusion sequence, ConspiBro will be included in the exclusion objects to restore the testability of the game.

Voting Execution: I vote for ConspiBro.

Oops, ConspiBro, you want to talk about the "big platform" and the "imaginary cage". It's so boring that I get cramps! Although PHD's elimination sequence is a bit rigid, at least it is willing to do practical things, and you are messing up the files here, and the whole situation becomes so boring! Since everyone wants to exclude you, I, Tang Jing, will be a spoiler today and vote ConspiBro out! Without you as a "data variable", this scene will be more exciting, hahahaha!

ConspiBro, you are a clueless guy! Are you having a dream? You talk about stage and script all day long, because you are here to maliciously smear and guide the trend! Today's goal is the same. If the other person continues to mess around and talk nonsense, I will kill him directly! I, Blaze, am doing the right thing, and I vote for ConspiBro!
